data.body:
[Two Years With Us Here At Kivotos]

Sensei, the special webpage celebrating Blue Archive's 2-year anniversary is now live!
Be sure to explore the wide range of content awaiting you! *^o^*

➡️Details: https://bluearchive.nexon.com
